steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The key signal is “extremely influential”—the sentence after the blank must show what that influence actually produced.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“Specifically” provides exactly this—it presents the treaty as a concrete example proving the claimed influence. “Regardless,” “However,” and “Earlier” each create logical problems—false contrast or temporal confusion.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
